productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Utility Deck Tan Shoes
description: Designed for those who love those healthy runs, the adidas Court Sequence Mid combines lightweight breathable comfort and flexibility that makes running all the more pleasurable.UpperSuede and aniline leather upper for durability and comfortStrategically placed synthetic overlays and stitched detailing for added shoe structureLace-up for snug FitPadded tongue and collar for snug fitPadded sockliner for all-day comfortBranding at the back of the collarTie-detail on the heel counter looped through metallic eyelets for stylingMidsoleTPU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDot pattern grooves and a suction point for great tractionShoe careBrush dirt off and treat surface with leather impregnation sprayDo not wash to preserve the beauty
